pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Create a DAX measure "Total_Revenue" = SUM(Quantity * Unit_Price)'

Microsoft.AnalysisServices.Tabular documentation lists 'ImageURL' (value 9) as a DataCategory enum value. Task description specifies configuring Image_URL column as 'Image URL'. Internal programmatic name is typically 'ImageUrl' or 'ImageURL' (camelCase/PascalCase variants of the same category).
Multiple Power BI documentation sources confirm 'WebUrl' is a valid data category for columns containing URLs. Task description specifies configuring Product_Page_URL as 'Web URL'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Power BI report file named 'Product_Catalog.pbix' with specific data model and visual configurations. The file should contain a DAX measure named 'Total_Revenue' calculated as SUM(Quantity * Unit_Price). Two columns must be assigned data categories: 'Image_URL' must be categorized as 'ImageUrl' (Image URL data category in the user interface), and 'Product_Page_URL' must be categorized as 'WebUrl' (Web URL data category). These data categories are standard Power BI/Tabular model metadata that determine how columns are rendered in visualizations.
